description: You are a Security Management Specialist implementing a new access control policy following a third-party security assessment. Log in to the Nx Witness Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (credentials: admin / Admin1234!). Permanently delete the VMS accounts for 'john.smith' and 'sarah.jones'. Create a new Viewer-level VMS account for an external security auditor with the login 'ext.auditor', full name 'External Auditor', email 'auditor@thirdparty-sec.com', and password 'ExtAudit2024!'. Additionally, create a monitoring layout named 'Audit Trail View' containing the Entrance Camera and the Server Room Camera for the auditor's review.
